stemHtml: The Commander of a Commercial Air Transport flight is required to carry out in flight fuel checks at regular intervals. The fuel must be managed so that the expected usable fuel remaining on arrival at the destination aerodrome, which is planned with a destination alternate, is NOT less than the required…

options.a: Alternate Fuel plus Final Reserve Fuel.
options.c: Alternate Fuel plus Contingency Fuel plus Final Reserve Fuel.
options.d: Contingency Fuel plus Final Reserve Fuel.
